---
title: "05 Failure And Reliability"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Main Question

Why do computer vision systems fail in production?

## Runnable Example

```bash
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --scenario gps_drift --no-mlflow
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --scenario calibration_error --no-mlflow
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --scenario delayed_observations --no-mlflow
```

## Engineering Focus

Failures are reproducible configuration, not informal stories. Each scenario produces metrics, plots, telemetry tables, and a Markdown report.

## Exercise

Create a scenario with dropped and corrupted observations. Compare correction rate and final drift against the baseline.
